title: SSA Computed Plan
description: Computed plan fields produced by the SSA automation runtime after imports → intelligence → automation. This object can be embedded under session.plan or stored separately for scheduling analytics.

plannedEndTs.description: Planned end timestamp derived from the selected percentile (typically p80).

p50Ms.description: Median expected total runtime from start to finish (ms).

criticalPath.description: Ordered step ids that define the schedule’s critical path. The first item should be the first critical step to begin; the last, the final to complete.

riskBadge.description: Aggregated plan risk computed from constraints (inventory, time pressure, device availability, RTC/network). Drives Next-Best-Action and degrade policy selection.

selectedPercentile.description: Which percentile the scheduler targeted when computing plannedEndTs and holds.

confidence.description: Confidence score (0–1) for the current plan given historical telemetry and variance.

explanations.description: Human-readable reasons behind the risk badge and selected percentile.

holds.description: Planned resource holds this plan requires (rooms/devices/people). Useful for pre-allocations.

hard.description: If true, this is a hard hold; planner must not oversubscribe.

meta.description: Forward-compatible bucket (algorithm versions, feature flags, debug).

explanations: Oven warmup adds 15 min on average
Quiet hours start at 06:00 local — prefer p80 to avoid spillover
